description_long: This is a modern athletic shoe with a low-cut profile and a robust, chunky sole. The upper appears to be made of a matte, possibly synthetic or mesh material, with a seamless silhouette and no visible branding or decorative elements. The sole is thick and features a striking gradient color transition from red at the heel to yellow at the toe, suggesting a sporty and energetic design. The shoe's outsole is rugged, likely providing good traction for urban environments. The overall build looks lightweight yet durable, suitable for walking or running on city streets. There are no visible laces or fasteners, indicating a slip-on or concealed lacing style.
description: A modern, low-cut athletic shoe with a thick, gradient red-to-yellow sole and a matte black upper, designed for urban use. The shoe is seamless and likely slip-on, with a rugged outsole for traction.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, highlighting the gradient sole and seamless black upper.
description_view_1: Front view emphasizing the rounded toe and the yellow portion of the sole.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the gradient sole and upper design seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the heel and the red portion of the sole.
